Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment: Overall it’s decent, definitely not worth the price. It’s too expensive for what it offers, you’re better off going with severe or serotonin, it’s basically the same thing just way better at a better bargain.

Categories.Comment: Good decent aimbot, however, very hard to configure. It has a lot of customizability for aimbot but some of the customizablitydoesn’t work as intended
It has very cluttered visuals imo. I don’t like how they look, just feels cluttered.
Interface is stuffed to the brim with bloat. It’s way too hard to find anything you really are looking for, configs are setup in a weird way as well. I’m not a fan of how the ui is setup.
It’s always up lol, they’re always like first to update, however stability and optimizations wise, not the best. It’s not that optimized, overlay becomes laggy and doesn’t run well on low end pcs.
Has decent features, some don’t work. However, I don’t think it’s received a feature update since a while. The only updates it’s been receiving are too keep it updated.

Reviews.Author: 27j8har5ld
Reviews.Comment: Very average external, while I tried to give DX9 the benefit of the doubt, my experience was terrible. They had me run a batch script to ensure the driver could map, and after restarting, Windows Hello completely forgot my PIN, which took over an hour to fix. Then came multiple BSODs while mapping the driver, and by the time it finally worked, I was already fed up. The exploit itself is just okay and nothing special, and based on my experience, I wouldn’t recommend it; if you’re expecting a lot, prepare to be disappointed.

Reviews.Author: 1ggi0omcgh
Reviews.Comment: Bought DX9 to see if it was really as bad as people make it out to be, and yeah, it absolutely is. The menu is horrible and extremely hard to use, around 50% of the features don't even work, and the aimbot is genuinely awful for the price you're paying. There's basically no customization, the menu feels choppy and outdated, and the whole thing comes across as unfinished. The only reason this cheat was ever popular was because it was one of the first big externals. By today's standards, it's complete dogshit for the price. The cheat desperately needs a major update and a full redesign. If you're looking for a good external around the same price range, I'd recommend Severe or Serotonin. Thx for reading my review :3
